arts.ttl: Arsenal handed SHOCK boost in Mohammed Kudus chase
arts.sum: Arsenal have been handed a surprise boost in their pursuit of West Ham United superstar Mohammed Kudus . In addition, Arsenal are also chasing the aforementioned Kudus, who has impressed since leaving Ajax to join West Ham last year.

arts.ttl: Arsenal injury news: Mikel Arteta issues Declan Rice, Riccardo Calafiori, Oleksandr Zinchenko update ahead of EFL Cup tie
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta delivers a fresh update on the fitness of Declan Rice ahead of Wednesday's EFL Cup quarter-final tie at home against Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Arteta believes winning Carabao Cup can offer trophy springboard for Arsenal
arts.sum: Arsenal host Crystal Palace in quarter-final tie Arteta hopes to use competition to build momentum Mikel Arteta believes that lifting the Carabao Cup can be the springboard to Arsenal winning bigger trophies as they prepare to face Crystal Palace in the quarter-finals on Wednesday. Arteta celebrates his fifth anniversary in charge on Friday but has only the FA Cup win in his first season and two Community Shields to show for it after finishing as Premier League runners-up for the past two seasons. The Arsenal manager is likely to field a strong side against Palace despite a shortage of defensive options, with the teenager Myles Lewis-Skelly expected to start again at left-back in the absence of Riccardo Calafiori and Oleksandr Zinchenko. arts.ttl: Declan Rice injury update as Arsenal duo remain sidelined
arts.sum: Declan Rice faces a late injury assessment before Mikel Arteta decides whether or not he will feature for Arsenal against Crystal Palace on Wednesday. The Gunners will host the Eagles at the Emirates Stadium for the quarter-finals of the League Cup, with kickoff set for 8pm UK time. arts.ttl: European Super League rebrand explained as Arsenal, Chelsea and Tottenham given new proposal
arts.sum: Rather than two groups of 10 in the ESL, the 'Unity League' will have four leagues – Star League, Gold League, Blue League and Union League – with 96 participating clubs from 55 UEFA associations. So, with that being said, football.london explains how the Unify League would work and how it impacts Arsenal, Chelsea and Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: Latest Arsenal injury news as four miss Crystal Palace with huge Declan Rice decision made
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has issued a triple Arsenal injury update ahead of facing Crystal Palace twice in the next three days. Calafiori had missed the same amount of action as Gabriel but did not feature against Everton with Arteta suggesting he is on the verge of returning but that Arsenal must also be careful.

arts.ttl: Every word Mikel Arteta said on Rice fitness, Arsenal transfer plans and Carabao Cup pressure
arts.sum: We want the big ones that’s for sure. Looking back at all the games in the league our margins are 10 times bigger than many other teams that won that day.
